name: evidence_synthesis
instructions: Synthesize across ALL provided articles. Conditional rule: if 'Reports Intervention' is true, you MUST populate 'Intervention Type' with one of its allowed values; if it is false, 'Intervention Type' MUST be null.

fields.name: Health Literacy
fields.description: Ability to find, understand and use of health-related information, which can be expressed as health knowledge, health literacy, patient educaiton or patient medication knowledge.

fields.name: Patient Autonomy
fields.description: The ability of individuals to take independent action in managing their health and actively participate in decisions about their care, which can be expressed as patient autonomy, patient empowerment, patient agency, patient involvement, patient decision making, patient experience, patient participation.

fields.name: Adherence
fields.description: The compliance of the patients to actively follow parts of therapy agreed with their physician, which can be expressed as treatment adherence, therapy adherence, patient adherence, medication adherence, treatment compliance.

fields.name: Evidence Strength
fields.description: Overall strength of evidence across the provided articles for the synthesized claims. Choose exactly one of the allowed values.

fields.name: Reports Intervention
fields.description: True if the synthesized evidence describes one or more concrete interventions aimed at improving the patient-side concepts above (health literacy, autonomy, or adherence). False if the articles are purely observational, descriptive, or theoretical with no intervention.

fields.name: Intervention Type
fields.description: Predominant category of intervention across the articles. Populate ONLY when 'Reports Intervention' is true; otherwise return null. Choose exactly one of the allowed values.
